---
title: "Efficient R Programming: A Practical Guide to Smarter Programming"
description: "Colin Gillespie and Robin Lovelace (2016). Efficient R Programming: A Practical Guide to Smarter Programming. *O’Reilly Media*."
date: "2016-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "gillespie_efficient_2016"
citation-type: "book"
citation-type-label: "Book"
venue: "O’Reilly Media"
doi: ""
publication-url: "https://csgillespie.github.io/efficientR/"
authors:
  - "Colin Gillespie"
  - "Robin Lovelace"
---

**Type:** Book
**Venue:** O’Reilly Media
**Year:** 2016

[URL](https://csgillespie.github.io/efficientR/) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Citation

Colin Gillespie and Robin Lovelace (2016). Efficient R Programming: A Practical Guide to Smarter Programming. *O’Reilly Media*.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@book{gillespie_efficient_2016,
  title = {Efficient {{R Programming}}: {{A Practical Guide}} to {{Smarter Programming}}},
  author = {Gillespie, Colin and Lovelace, Robin},
  date = {2016},
  publisher = {O'Reilly Media},
  url = {https://csgillespie.github.io/efficientR/},
  isbn = {978-1-4919-5078-4}
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
